author: Julian Treasure
name: The H.A.I.L Cornerstones
summary: Four foundations for speech that people actually want to listen to.

author: Mel Robbins
name: The 5-Second Rule
summary: Count 5-4-3-2-1 to interrupt self-doubt and launch yourself into action before anxiety sets in.

author: Amy Cuddy
name: The Pre-Talk Power Pose
summary: Two minutes of expansive posture before a speech measurably increases confidence and reduces cortisol.
